mnemonics: Additive Noise: Apathy , Subtractive Noise : Sincerity
keyPoints: 5.1: Types of Image Degradation - Noise, Blur, Distortion
5.2: Mathematical Models of Image Degradation - Point Spread Function, Filter Response
5.3: Image Restoration Techniques - Linear System, Non-Linear System, Maximum Likelihood Estimation
5.4: Reconstruction Techniques - Spatial Domain, Frequency Domain
